summary: ASAR Integrity bypass via content modification (Windows only, requires embeddedAsarIntegrityValidation + onlyLoadAppFromAsar fuses)
Heap buffer overflow in NativeImage::CreateFromPath / CreateFromBuffer
tarfile module Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) via crafted PAX header strings, causing excessive CPU usage
